summary: Verified bug fixes for Phoneme-Mon Solo Mode. CRITICAL BUG FIXES CONFIRMED: (1) CymaticsCanvas hex-to-rgba color conversion - NO JS errors detected during 45s of testing with canvas active. (2) CymaticsCanvas animation loop dependency - NO animation teardown/reinit errors. (3) App.js startListenRef pattern - working correctly. Full Solo Mode flow tested: Bootâ†’DiegeticInstallâ†’SOLOâ†’OracleSelectâ†’Calibrationâ†’BATTLE_LOOP. All state transitions work correctly. Backend 6/6 tests pass.

integration_issues.issue: Rounds don't advance in headless without mic (Round stays 0/10). First listen window never starts because oracleSay callback doesn't fire without speech synthesis. This is EXPECTED BEHAVIOR per context - not a bug. Real users with mic + speech synthesis will see rounds progress.

issues: Low contrast text (pre-existing) - SELECT MODE label uses rgba(255,255,255,0.35) on dark background

critical_code_review_comments: CymaticsCanvas hex-to-rgba bug FIX VERIFIED - hexToRgb utility properly converts hex colors like '#FF2A6D' to {r,g,b} objects, then used as rgba(r,g,b,alpha)
CymaticsCanvas animation loop FIX VERIFIED - Uses refs (featuresRef, activePhonemeRef, gameStateRef) with [] dependency to prevent teardown/reinit on every prop change
App.js startListenRef pattern FIX VERIFIED - useEffect keeps ref current, battle effects use startListenRef.current?.() avoiding stale closures

Speech synthesis callback in battle intro has no timeout fallback - if speech never fires callback, first listen window won't start. Could add setTimeout fallback like DiegeticInstall does for oracle_select phase.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test data from iteration_2
context_for_next_testing_agent: All critical bug fixes verified. Solo Mode flow: Boot(PASS)â†’clickâ†’DiegeticInstall(PASS)â†’SOLOâ†’8s fallback to oracle_select(PASS)â†’click MENTORâ†’Calibration 3 phases(PASS)â†’BATTLE_LOOP with BattleHUD visible(PASS). CymaticsCanvas renders throughout without errors. Round doesn't advance due to speech synthesis callback not firing in headless (expected). No JS errors except expected mic NotFoundError. EndGameScreen untested but code-reviewed: share-replay-button has data-testid when onShare prop passed.
rca_of_issues: Original bug: CymaticsCanvas line 194 was using hexColor directly in rgba() string e.g. 'rgba(#FF2A6D,0.15)' which is invalid CSS. Fixed by adding hexToRgb() utility function that properly extracts r,g,b values from hex string. Animation loop bug: useEffect had [features, activePhoneme, gameState] dependency causing ~43Hz teardown/reinit. Fixed by using refs to store these values and [] dependency for single setup.
verified_features: Boot screen loads with 'TOUCH TO LINK' prompt
Clicking boot screen advances to DiegeticInstall
Mode select shows SOLO, PASS & PLAY, ONLINE DUEL
Clicking SOLO advances through rules to oracle_select (8s fallback works)
Calibration shows BURST/FLOW/TONE phases with progress dots
After calibration, BATTLE_LOOP with BattleHUD visible
No JavaScript errors in console (except expected mic error)
